top_signals.title: U.S. sanctions Nobitex crypto exchange used by Iranian ransomware actors
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Treasury's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) has announced sanctions against Nobitex, Iran's largest cryptocurrency exchange, for facilitating payments related to terrorist activities. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Confirmed screwworm case in Texas sends two biotech stocks higher
top_signals.summary: Options volume is surging for Zoetis as traders look for potential stock market winners in light of a screwworm case in Texas.

top_signals.title: Sweet on Sugar to cause huge upset in the Oaks
top_signals.summary: AIDAN O’Brien is the modern dominant force in the Oaks with 11 victories to his name since 1998. The master of Ballydoyle relies on three fillies in this year’s renewal, with AMELIA EARHART his leading hope if jockey bookings and the betting is to be believed. She arrives to Epsom off the back of a [...]

top_signals.summary: It will be the fund's sixth overseas outpost, joining offices in New York, London, Singapore, Mumbai and San Francisco.
